response.overview: After a turning point in his life, Devon Parker, a 23 year old college dropout, takes up a job offering as a fire lookout for a rundown Camp Crystal Lake, and the surrounding forest. Haunted by legends of killers, fires and missing people, Devon is stalked by a force that’s been hiding in the abandoned Camp. One that’s been waiting for the last 40 years for fresh blood.
response.tagline: It’s hard to bury the past, when the past refuses to stay buried.
response.title: Friday the 13th: Watchtower
